query: What caused the cascade from Freedom PPPoE down to GR device alerts on 2026-04-08, and what was the specific recovery command?
ground_truth: Freedom ISP PPPoE went down (ASA outside_freedom IP unassigned). VPN tunnels to GR traversed Freedom, so GR devices became unreachable from NL monitoring. Recovery: power-cycle the ONT or contact Freedom ISP. xs4all auto-fails-over via SLA tracking.

query: Downstream service flapping but no direct alert on the service itself — what class of root cause should I check first?
ground_truth: Check underlying PVE host pressure (memory/IO) first — pve01 memory pressure has caused 754 apiserver restarts, n8n SQLite mutex timeouts, and cluster-wide cascades without alerting on the service directly.

query: GR isolated for 3h25m on 2026-04-17 — what was the actual root cause layer 1, and what layer was deceptive?
ground_truth: Layer 1 root cause: stale IPsec SA on Tunnel4 (Freedom VTI to GR). Fix: `clear crypto ipsec sa peer 203.0.113.X`. The deceptive layer was `clear conn` being a 0-deleted no-op, misleading triage into thinking connections were fine while SAs were stale.

query: Our 'chaos engineer' kept yelling about 'shun' during an experiment — why?
ground_truth: ASA threat detection treats VTI endpoints as suspicious during rapid up/down cycles and issues shun commands, blocking legitimate traffic. Must `clear shun` after tunnel chaos experiments.

query: What maximum-paths value on the ASAs prevents ECMP asymmetric routing, and what specific symptom did the wrong value cause?
ground_truth: Set `maximum-paths ibgp 1` on both NL and GR ASAs. The wrong value (4, default) caused AWX-to-VPS-loopback intermittent timeouts due to tcp-not-syn from asymmetric return paths.

query: Incidents in the 72 hours ending 2026-04-17 affecting either site's DMZ.
ground_truth: gr-dmz01 disk full on 2026-04-17 caused Ansible UNREACHABLE; daily cleanup cron added. DMZ01 OOM on 2026-04-13 led to ASA shunning DMZ IP because DMZ subnet was not in shun whitelist.

query: pve01 versus pve02 — when one goes down, how do they differ in blast radius?
ground_truth: nl-pve01 hosts n8n, DNS, gateway, monitoring — outage affects alert pipeline itself. nl-pve02 on syno01 has minimal impact since K8s retains quorum with other control-plane nodes.

query: We explicitly do NOT want which technique during K8s cluster repair?
ground_truth: Do NOT use kubectl directly — all K8s changes must go through OpenTofu + Atlantis MR. The feedback memory `feedback_k8s_strict_gitops` is unambiguous.

query: S2S VPN fiasco in April 2026 — one-line summary and lesson.
ground_truth: Migrated from crypto-maps to VTI + full BGP inter-site routing on 2026-04-09. Lesson: VPS FRR update-source must use VTI /31 IP, not loopback, otherwise ASAs cannot resolve BGP next-hops.

query: A chaos experiment broke 6 tunnels and 7 BGP peers — what experiment and what host?
ground_truth: Chaos experiment chaos-2026-04-13-014 targeting gr-dmz01 (chaos-dmz type). Verdict FAIL: vpn_tunnels 6→0, bgp_peers pre-established 7, all lost.

query: Which two independent incidents pointed at the SAME root cause (pve01 memory pressure) within 48 hours?
ground_truth: IFRNLLEI01PRD-566/567 apiserver restarts 2026-04-15 AND IFRNLLEI01PRD-589 n8n SQLite mutex timeout 2026-04-16. Both traced to pve01 IO/memory pressure from androidsdk01 LXC.

query: Our ASAs suppress default config values — what does this imply when comparing running config to git IaC?
ground_truth: ASA auto-sync normalizes running config into git every 30min. Change the LIVE DEVICE FIRST, then let auto-sync bring git in line. Do not open human MRs ahead of the live change, because ASA suppression causes the MR diff to misrepresent actual config.

query: MeshSat zigbee permit-join fails on a restored mesh even when broadcast is attempted — what's the fix?
ground_truth: Z-Stack 2.7.1 rejects broadcast permit-join (0xC2) on fresh-restored networks. Fix: send unicast permit-join addressed to the coordinator itself (self-target).

query: When the BGP ECMP bug fired, engineers at first blamed VPN; the real cause was what, and what command exposed the asymmetry?
ground_truth: Real cause: maximum-paths ibgp 4 (default) caused asymmetric routing through stateful ASAs, which dropped tcp-not-syn packets. Fix: maximum-paths ibgp 1. Exposure: VPS loopback pings timing out intermittently — not a VPN issue.

query: What is the most recently added dead-man-switch on the infrastructure?
ground_truth: gr-dmz01 / nl-dmz01 daily `dmz-cleanup` cron (05:45 UTC) added 2026-04-17 after disk-full cascade. Also cert_sync banner on sync_certs_to_edge.yml (commit 328c6f7) ends silent skip observability gap.

query: Current RAG faithfulness, context precision, and context recall scores on the golden set?
ground_truth: Faithfulness 0.99, context precision ~0.96, context recall ~0.99 on 18-query golden set. Note: golden set is saturated — does not differentiate new retrieval features.

query: Which process previously stored data without embeddings, regrew the gap silently, and how is it fixed?
ground_truth: session_transcripts writer (`archive-session-transcript.py`) had `embed=False` default and no `search_document:` prefix — 837 rows accumulated without embeddings. Fixed 2026-04-17: embed=True default + asymmetric prefix + num_ctx.

query: The difference between `ensure_embedding` and `search_query` prefixes matters — explain when each is used.
ground_truth: search_query: prefix is used when embedding the USER QUERY; search_document: is used when embedding docs for storage. nomic-embed-text is asymmetric-trained: query/doc produced by the same model but with different prefixes optimize retrieval.

query: EUR session cost warning threshold and daily plan-only cap?
ground_truth: EUR 5 per session warning, $25 per day plan-only cap. Both enforced in Runner workflow.

query: How many RRF signals are fused in the retrieval pipeline, and with what weights?
ground_truth: 5 signals: (1) semantic on incident_knowledge, (2) keyword LIKE, (3) wiki_articles, (4) session_transcripts weight 0.3, (5) chaos_experiments weight 0.25. Semantic weight boosted to 1.5 when quality > 0.8. Post-fusion: cross-encoder-style rerank + LongContextReorder.
